subject: refactor(z-index): centralize stacking tiers in src/constants/zIndex.ts
body:
Hardcoded zIndex values across DebugPill, DebugRootBoundary, Toast,
and BottomSheet already matched the glow-props Z_INDEX_SCALE tiers
(80, 70, 30), but each referenced the scale only via comment. Extract
them to a shared Z constant so drift can't happen silently.

Also record EVENT_BUS evaluation: not adopted. The app's data flow is
request/response via hooks, shared UI state lives in FilterContext,
and there's no service layer emitting mutation events. Re-evaluate if
a service layer emerges.

Tags: refactor, convention, z-index, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
